title: DBUU Date Sheet 2025 @ dbuu.ac.in

detail.title: DBUU Date Sheet 2025 @ dbuu.ac.in
detail.short_info: The officials of DBUU have released the DBUU Date Sheet 2025 for B.Sc.(Nursing). Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

content.text: DBUU Date Sheet 2025 is Out! The Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University has released the B.Sc.(Nursing). Students can access their DBUU Result 2025 using their registration number through the direct link here. For further updates on DBUU, candidates can follow this page.

sections.heading: How to Download the DBUU Date Sheet 2025?

content.text: Candidates follow the steps to download the Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University Date Sheet 2025, candidates check the details and download it easily.

items: The University home page will open
The examination Schedules page will pop up
Date Sheet for different courses will show up for Regular and Regular / External.

rows: Free Job Alert Tools for Free! No Sign Up Required!
